visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a blue t-shirt stands in a brightly lit indoor studio. He points at the camera with a smile. Large white text bubbles with blue outlines appear in the foreground. (2) The man begins gesturing with his hands as a colorful popsicle icon (the Zenly logo) appears over his chest area. The background remains a simple, out-of-focus grey-brown wall. (3) A new blue app icon with a triangular rainbow logo and the word 'Bump' appears in the center of the frame, replacing the previous icon. The man continues speaking enthusiastically with wide eye expressions. (4) The screen transitions to a digital interface showing a map of Europe with markers over the UK and Spain. The man appears in a small circular inset in the upper right corner, still speaking. (5) The visual shifts to a detailed map of Taipei City (Da'tong District) with multiple circular user avatars scattered across the streets. Digital overlays show 'Real-time' labels in Chinese. (6) Back to the man in center frame; various floating icons representing a battery, a timer, a location pin, and the Uber logo appear and disappear as he lists features. (7) A close-up graphic of a smartphone screen appears on the left with a 'BUMP!' message notification. The man points towards it, emphasizing the feature. (8) The man finishes with a strong hand gesture towards the viewer as a final call-to-action text appears.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 抓猴神器回來了!. [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko. (2) [Subtitle]: 相信很多情侶啊. (3) [Subtitle]: 都用過名為Zenly (冰棒). (4) [Subtitle]: 的社交APP. (5) [Subtitle]: 藉此來追踪定位另一半. (6) [Subtitle]: 如今喔. (7) [Slogan]: Bump 這個名稱重新回歸. (8) [Variety]: 5個國家. [Slogan]: 精準定位 不耗電. (9) [Subtitle]: 完全免費 沒有廣告. (10) [Subtitle]: 能夠精準顯示另一半的位置在哪. (11) [Subtitle]: 甚至可以看到他和誰在一起. (12) [Subtitle]: 電池剩多少 待了多久 移動多快 地址也能顯示 還可以查路線 叫Uber 分享即時抵達時間. (13) [Subtitle]: 當你和另一半相約地點 快抵達時候. [Variety]: BUMP!. (14) [Subtitle]: 發出一個嗡嗡的一個提示聲 來提醒對方. (15) [Slogan]: 來下載.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged male with a friendly expression, wearing thin-framed glasses, a grey checkered flat cap (newsboy style), and a solid blue crew-neck t-shirt. He wears a beaded bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a neutral-toned indoor studio wall with soft depth. Secondary backgrounds include various mobile app map interfaces (one showing Europe, another showing Taipei's urban grid) and graphic overlays.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Audio begins with high-energy male speech and a driving electronic pop beat. A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect emphasizes the opening statement. (2) A light 'pop' sound effect occurs as the first app icon is introduced. The vocal delivery is fast-paced and clear. (3) A digital 'chime' or UI sound effect triggers as the new app logo 'Bump' is mentioned. The music continues with consistent energy. (4) As the speaker lists multiple features, a series of short, high-pitched percussive 'dings' sync with the appearance of each icon on screen. (5) A distinct low-frequency 'buzz' or vibrating 'BUMP' sound effect plays to simulate a phone notification. (6) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic verbal call to action over the continuing background music, which fades slightly at the very end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Context -> Feature Demonstration -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the mobile application 'Bump' by positioning it as a superior and free successor to the discontinued social tracking app Zenly, highlighting its accuracy, low power consumption, and rich location-sharing features.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator directly presents the app, demonstrates its features on screen, and ends with a call to download.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-density 'variety-show' editing style with constant text overlays and synchronized sound effects to maintain viewer engagement in a short-form format.
